_bg_chosen_reason: asset_catalog.json suggested_uses includes 'M1 setup phase — דמות עומדת על רצפת המטוס מול הפתח שעומדת לקפוץ ממנו'. ground_line_y_pct=78 supports anchored standing on cargo deck. NOT_suitable_for is empty. filename_misleading=false.
_bg_NOT_chosen: backgrounds/bg_airplane.mp4 — listed in asset_catalog as filename_misleading=true (aerial canopy, no plane). NOT_suitable_for explicitly includes 'M1 setup phase'. This is the file v5 mistakenly used; we explicitly avoid it.

bg.opening_zone_y_pct: 20-65 (the jagged tear/ramp through which jungle is visible)

_anchor_proof.calculation: canvas_bottom_y_on_bg = (100 - bottom_pct) = 81.6.   feet_y_on_bg = canvas_bottom_y_on_bg - (1 - feet_y_pct_in_pose_canvas/100) * height_pct_of_bg = 81.6 - (1 - 0.96) * 60 = 81.6 - 2.4 = 79.2.   Target was 78.   Off by 1.2 pp — within acceptable tolerance (±2pp).
_anchor_proof.verdict: feet land at bg y=79% which is on the cargo deck, ~1pp below the marked ground line. ANCHORED CORRECTLY.
_anchor_proof.math_double_check_with_bottom_15: if bottom_pct=15, canvas_bottom=85, feet=85-2.4=82.6 (4.6 below ground) -- too low. bottom=18.4 is correct.

actress.pose_visual_role: she stands on cargo floor, framed by metal tear / open ramp behind her. Body silhouettes against bright sky+jungle visible through the opening.

rivals_overlay._zone_check: top:8% to bottom_of_zone:63% spans the opening area (y=20-65 on bg). Rivals appear as small distant figures visible through the open ramp — felt-not-seen rule (8-10% width each, opacity 0.45).
rivals_overlay.render_mode: canvas — chroma keyed silhouettes drawn at 4 random positions inside the zone
rivals_overlay.rival_size_pct: 8% width each, scattered, not overlapping actress

mission_text.verbatim: דלת המטוס נפרצה והרוח שואבת הכל החוצה! המתחרים כבר באוויר וצוברים יתרון מטורף. אני חייבת לקפוץ עכשיו כדי לא לפספס את אזור הנחיתה – איך אני מזנקת מכאן?

_5_question_self_check.Q1_actress_on_surface: YES — bottom:18.4% + height:60% places feet at bg y=79% which is on the cargo floor (rebbed metal deck with netting). Ground line was 78. Anchor proof above shows the math.
_5_question_self_check.Q2_what_behind_actress: פנים מטוס תובלה: לוחות מתקרה מתכת, מושבי קומנדו עם רצועות בצדדים, ובאמצע־אחור הפתח המרובע הקרוע שדרכו רואים שמיים בהירים, ערפל מטוס, אופק כחלחל ויער ג'ונגל ירוק.
_5_question_self_check.Q3_what_does_script_say: דלת המטוס נפרצה והרוח שואבת הכל החוצה! המתחרים כבר באוויר וצוברים יתרון מטורף. אני חייבת לקפוץ עכשיו כדי לא לפספס את אזור הנחיתה – איך אני מזנקת מכאן?
_5_question_self_check.Q4_match_script_to_visual: MATCH — keywords ['מטוס','דלת/פתח','נפרצה','המתחרים באוויר','אזור הנחיתה'] all have visual correspondents: cargo plane interior visible, jagged torn opening (door 'נפרצה'), rivals overlay in sky zone of opening, jungle below opening = landing area.
_5_question_self_check.Q5_will_a_7yo_understand: YES. Subject: actress with backpack center-frame, large enough to read. Situation: she's inside a plane with a torn opening, jungle below, sky outside. Choice: 3 tools at bottom (parachute, glider, wingsuit) — kid clicks one, she catches+jumps.
